_fixture.rationale: Phase H'' — Hapoalim dormant-account dashboard where the SPA fires only the canonical transactions endpoint as GET with a populated 200 body that fails the txn-shape gate (server returns a summary stub instead of the expected `transactions` array because the bank-SPA-default 30-day window is empty). The captured URL still exposes the canonical WK fromDate/toDate aliases (retrievalStartDate, retrievalEndDate) so the `windowParamsMatch` picker tier rescues the pick and SCRAPE re-queries with a wider window via `applyDateRangeToUrl`. Account number redacted per project PII policy.
